jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Westside
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Westside! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Westside:
Westside is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Westside!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
